sections.hideCompletedDesc: Applies to task lists, Kanban boards and project todos
sections.notificationsUnsupported: Your browser does not support notifications.
sections.departmentProfilesDesc: Work time rules for different departments — the active profile is used for all calculations.
sections.sidebarDesc: Drag to reorder · Dashboard & Calendar are always visible

updater.notSupported: Updates are only supported in the desktop app.
updater.upToDate: The app is up to date!

dashboardWidgets.title: Dashboard widgets
dashboardWidgets.description: Choose which sections are visible on the dashboard.

dayPlan.label: Day plan
dayPlan.desc: Timeline with items from the AI day planner

workoffice.label: Office & colleagues
workoffice.desc: Who's in the office, who's working from where?

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language of the user interface.

whatsapp.title: Link WhatsApp
whatsapp.description: Connect your WhatsApp number to NOVAT so the bot can handle tasks, reminders and messages for you.
whatsapp.sendHint: Send this code via WhatsApp to the NOVAT bot.
whatsapp.noCode: No active code. Generate one and send it via WhatsApp.
whatsapp.sandboxHint: If the first message is blocked, send the sandbox command once, then send the account link code.
whatsapp.serverUnavailable: NOVAT server is unavailable. WhatsApp linking is not available right now.
whatsapp.memoryHint: Incoming WhatsApp messages are also available under

guide.title: What can NOVAT do?
guide.intro: NOVAT combines tasks, projects, calendar, time tracking and AI in one tool — here's an overview of every area.
guide.shortcutsDesc: Work faster with shortcuts for new tasks, calendar, search and more.
guide.privacyDesc: Export your data, read the privacy policy or delete your account at any time.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.desc: Your daily overview: tasks, appointments, weather, office status and AI quick capture.
dashboard.tip: Type "Meeting tomorrow 2pm with Max" or "Task: write report by Friday"

tasks.title: Tasks & Inbox
tasks.desc: Personal task lists, smart lists (Today, Week, Overdue) and quick capture.
tasks.tip: Press N for a new task

projects.title: Projects & Kanban
projects.desc: Team boards with columns, milestones, time budget, timer and multi-assignee.
projects.tip: Start the timer on a card — time is logged to the project

calendar.title: Calendar
calendar.desc: Month, week and day views. Sync Google, Outlook and iCal.
calendar.tip: Team filter shows colleagues' vacation and absences

worktime.title: Work time
worktime.desc: Clock in/out, week view, absences. Input: 8 = 8 hours, 8:30 = 8½ hours.
worktime.tip: Quick buttons 4h / 6h / 8h / Target when focused on the field

ai.title: AI scheduling & planner
ai.desc: Automatic appointment suggestions, AI day planner and weekly report.
ai.tip: The day planner creates real tasks with start times

brain.title: Second brain
brain.desc: Notes, ideas and knowledge base — linked to tasks and projects.

eisenhower.title: Eisenhower matrix
eisenhower.desc: Prioritize by importance and urgency in four quadrants.

team.title: Colleagues & teams
team.desc: Connect with colleagues, create teams and see who's away.

chat.title: Chat
chat.desc: Direct messages with colleagues — synced in real time.

meetings.title: Meetings
meetings.desc: Record meeting notes and manage protocols.

features.title: Features
features.description: Hide areas you don't need — they disappear from the sidebar.

calendar.label: Calendar
calendar.description: Month, week and day view of your events

eisenhower.label: Eisenhower Matrix
eisenhower.description: Sort tasks by importance and urgency

calendar.title: External calendars
calendar.description: Connect your calendars — events are imported into NOVAT automatically.
calendar.icloudPlaceholder: Paste an ICS or Webcal link
calendar.icloudHint: iCloud: Settings → Calendar → Share Calendar → Copy link
calendar.fewConnections: 💡 Connect Google or Outlook using the "Connect" button above. iCloud works instantly via calendar link (no setup needed).

profile.title: Profile
profile.roleDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Project lead, sales team lead…
profile.roleDescriptionHint: Short description of your role in the company — visible to colleagues and admins.

password.title: Change password
password.errorTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters long

privacy.exportDescription: Download all your data stored with NOVAT (profile, tasks, projects, comments, work hours, calendar entries) as a JSON file (Art. 15 GDPR).
privacy.deleteDescription: This permanently deletes your account and all associated data (Art. 17 GDPR – right to erasure). This action cannot be undone.
